title: astragalus nervifolius
intro: Astragalus nervifolius, also known as the nervous milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus nervifolius include enhancing immune function, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tincture form, as well as a tea or infusion, to support overall well-being.
